brief_notes: Comprehensive benchmarking study with well-organized tables covering accuracy, runtime, mock community, and unknown-species scenarios. Claims 13 tools but only shows 8 in detail; methods for synthetic data generation lack specifics (error models, genome selection); real gut microbiome results are mentioned but never shown. Overall a solid benchmarking paper with practical guidance, but incomplete reporting of all 13 tools and missing real-data results reduce rigor.
